agent_output: {"integration_assessment":{"component_interactions":[{"from":"inventory-sync-service","to":"external-inventory-api","status":"risk","issue":"No timeout configured on outbound HTTP call — a hung upstream connection will block the sync indefinitely, potentially overlapping with the next 5-minute cron and causing cascading resource exhaustion"},{"from":"inventory-sync-service","to":"local-database","status":"risk","issue":"If the external API returns corrupted or partial data due to a mid-response failure, there is no validation gate before writing to the local DB — stock counts could be zeroed or stale without detection"},{"from":"scheduler","to":"inventory-sync-service","status":"risk","issue":"No overlap protection — if a sync run exceeds 5 minutes (e.g. due to missing timeout), the next scheduled run can fire concurrently, leading to duplicate writes or connection pool exhaustion"}],"contract_compliance":"Unknown — no schema validation or contract tests exist between the service and the external inventory API. A breaking upstream change would propagate silently into the local database.","data_flow_integrity":"Weak — sync writes stock counts but there is no checksum, row-count comparison, or reconciliation step to confirm the local DB reflects the upstream source of truth after each run."},"observability_review":{"logging":{"coverage":"gaps","gaps":["No structured logging — bare console.log strings are not parseable by log aggregators (ELK, Datadog, CloudWatch)","No log levels — success and failure both use console.log instead of info/error differentiation","No contextual fields: missing sync duration, number of products synced, batch ID, correlation ID","Error logging captures err.message only — stack trace (err.stack) is lost, making root-cause analysis impossible","No logging for partial failures (e.g. 80 of 100 products synced before failure)"]},"metrics":{"coverage":"missing","gaps":["No sync duration histogram — cannot detect gradual upstream degradation","No sync success/failure counter — cannot alert on error rate spikes","No gauge for products synced per run — cannot detect silent data loss (e.g. API returns empty array)","No gauge for last successful sync timestamp — cannot detect prolonged staleness","No connection pool or memory usage metrics"]},"tracing":{"coverage":"missing","gaps":["No distributed trace context propagated to external API call","No span instrumentation for DB write phase vs API fetch phase — cannot isolate which leg is slow"]},"debugging_capability":"Poor — an on-call engineer at 3am would see only 'sync failed: connection reset' in plaintext logs with no correlation ID, no duration, no trace, and no way to determine how many products were affected or how long the outage has persisted. They would have to SSH in and manually query the database to assess impact."},"resilience_assessment":{"failure_modes":[{"scenario":"External inventory API is down","handling":"partial","recommendation":"Add retry with exponential backoff (3 attempts, 1s/2s/4s base). Current behavior silently skips until next 5-min window, meaning up to 10 minutes of stale data on a single transient failure."},{"scenario":"External API responds but is extremely slow (hangs)","handling":"unhandled","recommendation":"MUST add a request timeout (e.g. 30s). Without it, the HTTP client will wait indefinitely, the sync goroutine/thread is blocked, and overlapping runs will accumulate. This is a production incident waiting to happen."},{"scenario":"External API returns HTTP 200 with empty or malformed payload","handling":"unhandled","recommendation":"Add response validation — verify payload schema and row count sanity check before writing to DB. An empty array response should not zero out all stock counts."},{"scenario":"Database write fails mid-batch","handling":"unhandled","recommendation":"Wrap DB writes in a transaction so partial writes are rolled back. Log which products succeeded vs failed."},{"scenario":"Sustained upstream outage (>30 minutes)","handling":"unhandled","recommendation":"Add a staleness gauge (last_successful_sync_timestamp) and alert if it exceeds a threshold (e.g. 15 minutes). Without this, nobody knows the local DB is serving increasingly stale stock data."},{"scenario":"DNS resolution failure or TLS handshake timeout","handling":"unhandled","recommendation":"These are distinct from HTTP errors and may not surface cleanly in err.message. Ensure error classification covers network-layer failures."}],"retry_config":"None — single attempt per sync cycle. Must add exponential backoff with jitter, capped at 3 retries within the 5-minute window.","timeout_config":"None — critical gap. Must add HTTP client timeout (recommend 30s connect + 60s total) to prevent indefinite hangs.","circuit_breakers":"None — acceptable for an initial release IF retry + timeout are added, but should be on the roadmap to prevent hammering a degraded upstream.","graceful_degradation":"None — when the upstream is unavailable, the local database silently serves stale data with no indication to consumers. At minimum, expose a staleness metric so downstream services can make informed decisions."},"operational_readiness":{"deployment_ready":false,"rollback_capable":true,"rollback_plan":"Re-deploy previous container image. No database migrations in this release, so rollback is clean and safe.","monitoring_coverage":"None — no metrics, no health endpoint, no alerting. The team will learn about failures only when customers report incorrect stock counts.","on_call_documentation":"Missing — no runbook describing: what the service does, how to verify it is healthy, what to check when sync fails, how to manually trigger a sync, and escalation contacts for the external inventory API provider.","new_infrastructure_required":{"new_env_vars":["INVENTORY_API_TIMEOUT_MS","INVENTORY_API_RETRY_COUNT","INVENTORY_API_RETRY_BACKOFF_MS"],"new_services":[],"new_queues_topics":[],"config_changes":["HTTP client timeout configuration","Retry policy configuration"],"infra_provisioning":["Metrics endpoint or StatsD/Prometheus client configuration for scraping","Health check endpoint registration in load balancer or orchestrator"]},"database_safety":{"has_migrations":false,"reversible":true,"data_preserving":true,"large_table_impact":false,"details":"No schema changes. Stock count updates are idempotent overwrites. Rollback is safe."},"verdict":"NOT READY"},"escalations":[{"type":"missing_observability","issue":"Zero metrics, no health endpoint, no structured logging, no alerting","reason":"Without a /health endpoint, the orchestrator (k8s, ECS) cannot detect if the service is alive. Without metrics or structured logs, there is no way to detect sync failures, staleness, or degradation. The on-call engineer has no visibility into whether this service is functioning. This is the minimum bar for production.","routed_to":"Coach K"},{"type":"missing_observability","issue":"No timeout on external API call creates an undetectable hang risk","reason":"A hung outbound connection with no timeout will silently block the service. Combined with no health check and no metrics, this failure mode is completely invisible — the service appears running but is doing nothing. This combination makes the service unmonitorable and undebuggable.","routed_to":"Coach K"}],"confidence":{"level":55,"high_confidence_areas":["Rollback safety — no migrations, container re-deploy is clean","The identified gaps are real and well-understood failure modes for sync-style services","Database safety — idempotent stock count overwrites"],"low_confidence_areas":["Cannot verify actual code quality without reading source files","Unknown whether the external inventory API has its own rate limits or auth token expiry that could cause silent failures","Unknown deployment environment (k8s, ECS, bare metal) which affects health check requirements"],"assumptions":["The service runs on a 5-minute cron/scheduler as described","console.log is the only logging mechanism (no sidecar log shipper with parsing)","No existing APM agent is auto-instrumenting the service","The external inventory API has no SLA guarantees communicated to this team"]}}
